---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature or a new renderer/theme
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**

What documentation workflow is hard or impossible today?

**Proposed solution**

What you'd like md2pdf to do. If it's a Markdown feature, include example input and
the desired output.

**Where it fits**

If you know the area (parser / IR / a renderer / theme / CLI), mention it — see
[docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](../../docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) and
[docs/ROADMAP.md](../../docs/ROADMAP.md).

**Alternatives considered**
